description_long: This is a dark blue military jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and swept-back wings, featuring prominent green accents on the wing tips, tail, and nose. The aircraft displays white military markings, including stars and the word 'MARINES' on the fuselage, as well as the alphanumeric code 'LF' on the tail and wings. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and appears to be a single-seat configuration, positioned near the front of the fuselage. The wings are mid-mounted with noticeable dihedral angles and are equipped with underwing pylons carrying ordnance or fuel tanks. The tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers with green striping. The overall design suggests a classic jet fighter, likely from the mid-20th century, with robust landing gear and a compact, agile profile.
description: A dark blue military jet airplane with swept-back mid-mounted wings, green accents, and white 'MARINES' markings. Features an enclosed single-seat cockpit, underwing pylons, and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, 'MARINES' text, cockpit, swept wings, and tail markings.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the wingspan, green striping, and symmetrical layout of the wings and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with visible cockpit, wing pylons, and tail details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the nose, cockpit canopy, underwing pylons, and the full width of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with moderately swept-back wings, noticeable dihedral angle, and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine integrated within the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
